sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n18085" key="a)fa/brwma" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀφάβρωμα</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ατος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, Megarian name of a <sense id="n18085.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">woman's garment,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.295b</biblScope> </bibl>; cf. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἅβρωμα.</foreign> </sense> </entryFree>
